## Maturity

- [ ] Production-ready — in active production use, documented, maintained
- [ ] Maturing — functional, actively developed, growing community
- [ ] Early-stage — promising but incomplete

*What does it do? What makes it distinctly open or cooperative? What specific capability or gap does it address?*
